description: Evidence-grade weld close-up: viewfinder-framed photo card with horizontal weld bead and a linear indication at the lower toe (static base). Reveals: detection ping on the indication, camera squared 90 deg to the photo plane with raking light + ripple shadows, calibrated 50 mm scale tab beside the indication, DATUM B marker + 240 mm distance callout + UP orientation arrow, WELD 12A physical tag, and a VT-07 indication-ID slate linked to a highlighted log row.
